title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Brûlée, Big Mom, Big Mom Pirates, Nami, Jinbe, Pudding as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: about three and a half hours ago, Bege's Hideout

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you can put a mirror up in there,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can jump straight from mirror world into the inside of the cake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That'll be pretty sweet, right? Ahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you crazy?! Don't tell me you're planning on destroying the cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You lot have no idea how much Mama's been looking forward to that thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, you! Back in that forest, you made copies of Nami and the others, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah! Bruce can take the image of someone reflected in a mirror

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and project it onto someone or something else!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: whereze... wheeze... okay, I caught a bunch.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: make all of these little guys into me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The preliminary preparations have gone off without a hitch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Have burst out of the cake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is quite the Perfor- Mance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is big news! That is one of the pirates of the worst generation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And why are there so many of him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it'll be over in a second! I'm counting on you, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So straw hat Luffy and the others didn't die in prisoner's library?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bastard Opera! He just saved his own skin!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy, you say?! That bastard!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
